hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo '=== tic-tac-toe Session ==='; echo "Branch: $branch"; if [ "$branch" = "master" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo ''; echo 'WARNING: On master. Create a worktree first:'; echo '  git worktree add .claude/worktrees/<name> -b <branch>'; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in "$repo_root"/*) if [ "$branch" = "master" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit files on master." >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); changes=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$changes" -gt 0 ] && [ "$branch" != "master" ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then echo ''; echo '=== Before Claiming Work Complete ==='; echo '1. dotnet build'; echo '2. dotnet test test/TicTacToe.Engine.Tests/'; echo '3. dotnet test test/TicTacToe.Web.Tests/ (if applicable)'; echo '4. Verify server runs'; echo '5. /verification-before-completion'; fi
